meta.title: Komfort Instal — end-to-end home installations
meta.description: End-to-end heat recovery ventilation (MVHR) for homes. Design, installation, service, pricing and subsidies. Trzebinia, Małopolska.

hero.title: End-to-end home installations
hero.subtitle: Fast install • Expert team
hero.imageAlt: Modern home with a heat recovery ventilation system

intro.title: What is heat recovery ventilation?
intro.paragraph1: MVHR is a modern ventilation system that provides a constant air exchange in your building without opening windows. Stale air is removed, and fresh air — pre-filtered and pre-heated — is supplied in its place.
intro.paragraph2: The result: always fresh air at home, with no heat loss and no influence from outside conditions.

items.title: Real savings and lower bills
items.description: MVHR can recover up to 80–90% of the heat from the air extracted from your home. That means less energy lost and real savings on heating — especially in new, well-insulated buildings. The investment pays back through lower bills and a more efficient heating system.

items.title: Comfort and healthy air all year
items.description: With MVHR you no longer need to open windows to ventilate. The system runs continuously, delivering fresh, filtered air without drafts, noise or outdoor pollution.

items.title: A proper installation = trouble-free for years
items.description: MVHR works well only when it's well designed and well installed. That's why we focus on:
bullets: an individual design matched to the building

subsidies.title: Subsidies

items.name: OZE Loan
items.description: OZE loan for residents — FEMP finances green-energy investments for single-family-home owners in Małopolska.

items.name: Moje Ciepło
items.description: NFOŚiGW subsidy for heat pumps in new homes — from 7,000 to 21,000 PLN depending on the unit type.

items.name: Mój Prąd
items.description: Support programme for prosumers buying and installing PV, energy storage and heat storage.

items.name: Czyste Powietrze
items.description: Programme for single-family-home owners — replacing heat sources, thermal upgrades and energy audits.
details: Support: up to 136,200 PLN depending on income
